response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical and architectural demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there’s limited evidence of formal project management or client-facing architecture advisory experience at an executive level.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js, DLang), and cloud-native systems
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' — falls far short of required C1 level
Lacks clear evidence of client architecture advisory or requirements management in consulting context
No explicit experience with UML modeling or formal IT security/compliance frameworks in resume
